scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:grille-party" "npm run dev:wordaily" "npm run dev:mot-de-passe"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=@party-games/server && npm run build --workspace=@party-games/grille-party-client && npm run build --workspace=@party-games/wordaily-client && npm run build --workspace=@party-games/mot-de-passe-client
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=@party-games/server && npm run lint --workspace=@party-games/grille-party-client && npm run lint --workspace=@party-games/wordaily-client && npm run lint --workspace=@party-games/mot-de-passe-client
